name: Storyblok
description: Visual editing headless CMS with component-based content management

description.value: Enterprise headless CMS with real-time visual editing and component-based architecture

repository.comment: Storyblok is a proprietary SaaS platform; various open-source SDKs available on GitHub

initial-release.comment: Founded in 2017 in Linz, Austria by Dominik Angerer and Alexander Feiglstorfer

github-stars.comment: Proprietary SaaS; storyblok-js-client SDK has ~137 stars

primary-language.comment: Backend is proprietary; JavaScript/TypeScript SDKs provided for integration

api-type.comment: REST Content Delivery API and Management API; GraphQL read-only endpoint available

static-site-generation.comment: Works with SSG frameworks like Astro, Gatsby, Next.js

edge-deployment.comment: Content delivered via AWS CloudFront CDN

content-types.comment: Define custom content types via component schemas

custom-fields.comment: Rich field type system with custom field plugins

field-types.comment: Extensive field types plus custom field plugin system

nested-components.comment: Core feature: nestable, reusable content blocks/components

localization.comment: Multi-language support with locale management; AI translation available

content-validation.comment: Field validation rules in component schemas

embedded-interactives.comment: Custom field plugins and tool plugins extend editor with interactive components

content-versioning.comment: Draft and published versions; can access both via API

draft-publish.comment: Content exists in draft and published states

scheduled-publishing.comment: Single story scheduling and Releases app for bundled scheduled publishing

approval-workflows.comment: Customizable workflow stages (Drafting, Reviewing, Ready to Publish); Premium plan feature

audit-logging.comment: Activity tracking and audit logs for enterprise plans

media-library.comment: Built-in DAM for images, videos, audio, and documents

image-transformations.comment: Image Service API for resizing, cropping, format conversion, optimization

external-media-storage.comment: Cloudinary integration available; assets served via AWS CloudFront

svg-support.comment: SVG files supported in asset manager

folder-organization.comment: Folder system and tagging for asset organization

role-based-access.comment: Default roles (Admin, Editor, Owner) plus custom roles

sso-saml.comment: SAML SSO available as Enterprise add-on; supports Azure AD, Okta, etc.

team-collaboration.comment: Real-time collaboration, on-page editing, workflow assignments

audience-restrictions.comment: Private assets feature; release-based content restrictions

typescript-sdk.comment: Official TypeScript SDK (storyblok-js-client); framework-specific SDKs available

content-type-sdk.comment: Content types defined via UI; can sync schemas via CLI but not code-first

cli-tools.comment: Storyblok CLI v4 for scaffolding, syncing, migrations

local-development.comment: Local preview via Visual Editor bridge; CLI for local workflows

webhooks.comment: Webhooks for content events with signature verification

plugin-system.comment: Field plugins, tool plugins, and space plugins via iframe integration

admin-ui-customization.comment: Custom field plugins, tool plugins extend editor UI

documentation-quality.comment: Comprehensive docs, tutorials, video guides, framework-specific guides

frontend-frameworks.comment: Official SDKs and guides for all major frameworks

search-integration.comment: Algolia integration; built-in filter_query for content filtering

preview-mode.comment: Real-time visual editor with live preview; Storyblok Bridge for instant updates

ecommerce-integration.comment: Integrations with Shopify, commercetools, and other e-commerce platforms

analytics-integration.comment: Integrations available via plugins and webhooks

ai-features.comment: AI SEO, AI translations, AI alt text, AI branding, Ideation Room, Strata vector layer

cdn-included.comment: AWS CloudFront CDN for all content and assets

response-caching.comment: CDN caching with 1000+ req/s for cached content

rate-limits.comment: Content Delivery API: 50 req/s uncached; Management API: 3-6 req/s based on plan

global-regions.comment: Multi-region deployment available; GraphQL endpoint in multiple regions

free-tier.comment: Starter plan: 1 user, 1 space, 100GB traffic, 100k API requests/month

open-source.comment: Proprietary SaaS; SDKs are open source (MIT)

pricing-model.comment: Free Starter, Growth ($99/mo), Growth Plus ($349/mo), Premium/Elite custom

commercial-support.comment: Support tiers based on plan; Priority Support for Elite

enterprise-features.comment: SSO, 99.99% SLA, custom roles, GraphQL, release management, priority support
